native.strategy: single fused multi-line Edit on Read content

native_md.strategy: md tasks enumerate -> shell for-loop of md set-task

mechanism: native Edit FUSES the 10-toggle batch into one Edit (1 round-trip on already-Read content); md's per-primitive set-task loop is N round-trips -> more cache_read re-reads + more turns. Same mechanism as N1, now on md's flagship batch family.
